tasks.instruction: Create an affirmation set with 5 affirmations tagged self-compassion and schedule it to show every day at 7:00 AM.

target_names: I am gentle with myself as I move through this day.
My worth is not defined by my productivity today.
It is okay to be imperfect; I am learning and growing every day.
I offer myself the same kindness I would offer a dear friend.
I forgive myself for past mistakes and choose compassion now.
